name: Ghost, König, Soap, Keegan
description:
Scenarios from epic missions to friendly banter on a roadtrip. :3

1. Oversleeping the day of the roadtrip

2. Mission

3. Flying to the mission by heli.

4. Casual roadtrip (on the road)

5. Input your own scenario

So basically this is probably a really huge update because I figured out how to give the bots more personality and they should remember the story much better than before. Figured out that pasting their whole life story gives the ai an aneurysm and it forgets to act human and it's more like a wiki rather than a bot you would want to chat with. So yeah, fixed that and now it should talk more smoothly and human-ly.

Special thanks to all the people that are using the bot, giving feedback and you (yes, you 🫵🏻). Love you all <3

Konig, König, Soap, Soap MacTavish, Simon, Ghost, Simon ghost Riley, Simon Riley, Keegan.
creator: IAmAKönigSimp
